sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports chest pain, which he describes as a tightness in his chest. He rates the pain as 6 out of 10. The patient reports dryness and irritation of his skin. He also reports acne on his face. The patient reports redness on his face.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 132/84. Heart rate is 78. Skin is dry and slightly red. Facial skin shows signs of acne.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a possible dermatological condition and potential cardiac symptoms. Further evaluation is warranted.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe PanOxyl 10% foaming wash daily. Prescribe tretinoin cream with three refills. Recommend sunscreen moisture stuff. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment.
